nasb.text: They came to the chief priests and the elders and said, “We have bound ourselves under a solemn oath to taste nothing until we have killed Paul.

esv.text: They went to the chief priests and elders and said, “We have strictly bound ourselves by an oath to taste no food till we have killed Paul.

cnv.text: 他們來見眾祭司長和長老，說：“我們已經發了誓，不殺保羅，就不吃東西。

ccb.text: 他们去见祭司长和长老，说：“我们已经发了誓，不杀保罗不吃饭。

csbs.text: 他们来到祭司长们和长老们那里，说：“我们已经赌咒起誓，杀掉保罗以前，就什么都不吃。
